aventurine.title: Aventurine – Honkai Star Rail
aventurine.desc: The goal was to capture the charisma, audacity and eccentricity of a gambler. Unlike the original (mysterious and monotone), more life and character were breathed into this performance.
aventurine.mic: Rode NT1 5th Gen / Scarlett Solo 4th Gen

billy_henshin.title: Billy Henshin – Zenless Zone Zero
billy_henshin.desc: An over-the-top comedic scene referencing the spandex superhero serials of the 90s. Maximum positivity while keeping the "badass" flair of a hyper-expressive character.
billy_henshin.mic: Rode NT1 5th Gen / Scarlett Solo 4th Gen

edgerunners.title: Edgerunners – Cyberpunk: Edgerunners
edgerunners.desc: Strong tension between the characters — frustrated embarrassment of one vs. mockery and superiority of the other. Recorded with natural, cinematic delivery in mind rather than traditional dubbing.
edgerunners.mic: Rode NT1 5th Gen / Scarlett Solo 4th Gen

mr_stark.title: Mr. Stark – Avengers: Infinity War
mr_stark.desc: A demanding emotional balancing act — neither over-the-top nor stiff. Special attention was paid to the micro-expressions characteristic of the film medium.
mr_stark.mic: Rode NT1 5th Gen / Scarlett Solo 4th Gen

one_piece.title: One Piece – One Piece Live Action
one_piece.desc: The first half — subtle, tender emotional delivery, as if the hero is still hiding what he feels. The second half — more direct, full of sincere feelings and reflections.
one_piece.mic: Rode NT1 5th Gen / Scarlett Solo 4th Gen

chainsaw_man.title: Chainsaw Man – Chainsaw Man
chainsaw_man.desc: A scene showcasing three modulations capturing extreme emotions: excitement, motivation, and surprise. A wild performance the author thoroughly enjoyed while embodying each character.
chainsaw_man.mic: Rode NT1 5th Gen / Scarlett Solo 4th Gen

dare_devil.title: Daredevil – Marvel Rivals
dare_devil.desc: The inspiration was the English voice actor of the character — Aleks Le. The challenge was voice modulation and giving Daredevil's lines the power they deserve.
dare_devil.mic: Rode NT1 5th Gen / Scarlett Solo 4th Gen

transformers_one.title: Transformers One – Transformers One
transformers_one.desc: Even though the film targets a younger audience, emotional depth was the priority — not modulation. The voice carries rage, frustration, worry, sorrow, and a hint of hope.
transformers_one.mic: Rode NT1 5th Gen / Scarlett Solo 4th Gen

sin.title: Sin – Guilty Gear Strive
sin.desc: A character close to the heart — first recorded at the very start of a fandubbing career. The re-recording reveals clear progress in a short time. Better character analysis led to an even better performance.
sin.mic: Rode NT1 5th Gen / Scarlett Solo 4th Gen

PortfolioGrid.dubbingpediaDesc: A complete list of official professional dubbing projects I have appeared in.
PortfolioGrid.instagramDesc: My most active and popular profile. I post my own dubbing clips of scenes and funny videos — purely as a hobby, because dubbing is my passion!
PortfolioGrid.youtubeDesc: On this channel you can see the productions I started with and how they evolved over the years. Occasionally I stream live recordings of amateur dubbing projects — from translation and audio track creation all the way to recording and final production!

DirectContact.successDesc: I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
DirectContact.errorDesc: Please try again or reach out directly via email.

LogoTicker.title: Here's where I appeared!
LogoTicker.description: These are the projects, creators and studios where I had the honour of officially lending my voice.

SEO.title: Skryty | Professional Voice Actor
SEO.description: Professional voice-over services for commercials, narrations, character acting, and audiobooks. Bring your scripts to life with emotion and clarity.

Error.notFoundDesc: The page you are looking for could not be found.

AboutMe.title: About Me
AboutMe.subtitle: The Voice Behind the Vibe
AboutMe.description: I am a versatile and passionate voice actor specializing in bringing characters, brands, and narrations to life. With years of experience behind the mic, I've developed a chameleon-like ability to adapt my tone—from warm and conversational to authoritative and cinematic. My goal is simple: to make your script resonate with its intended audience, ensuring every word hits the mark.
AboutMe.goalsDesc:
I am eager to work on official, professional dubbing projects, as well as amateur ones.
Depending on the project or needs, I am able to work not only for pay but also for free.
I also offer free joint directing sessions with the client, remotely or at a studio of the client's choosing.
Feel free to reach out — I can't wait for us to work together!

AudioDemos.title: Audio Demos
AudioDemos.subtitle: Pure voice, no video — let the sound speak for itself.

acting.title: Acting Demo
acting.desc: A full emotional palette — from subtle tension to intense drama. The voice shaped by the character and the scene.

audiobook.title: Narration Demo
audiobook.desc: Warm, persuasive tone — a voice that commands attention from the first second and makes the brand unforgettable.

commercial1.title: Commercial Demo
commercial1.desc: Energetic dynamics and crisp diction. Built for spots that demand pace, expression, and clarity.

commercial2.title: Commercial Demo 2
commercial2.desc: Energetic dynamics and crisp diction. Built for spots that demand pace, expression, and clarity.
